name: Reimerswaal (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the sword and the wavy stripes

description: A red field with an upright silver sword (golden hilt) flanked by two black bars, and blue-and-white wavy stripes at the hoist and fly.
history: Flag of the municipality of Reimerswaal on the Zuid-Beveland peninsula in the province of Zeeland, named after a town lost to the sea.

features.role: an upright silver sword with a golden hilt
two black bars flanking the sword
blue-and-white wavy stripes at the hoist and fly
